name: po-assist
description: 产品经理工具集 - 将 Wiki 或本地文档转换为结构化 PRD 并自动创建 DPMP Story。支持文档转换、需求审查、Story 分析与创建等功能。

interface.shortDescription: PRD conversion and Story workflow tools for product managers
interface.longDescription: PO Assist helps product managers convert Wiki or local documents into structured PRDs, analyze requirements, generate Story plans, upload or export Wiki pages, and create DPMP Stories through repeatable workflows.
defaultPrompt: 使用 Poskill 转换需求文档
分析需求并生成 Story 规划
